channel.title: Boss Kev Curated Newsfeed
channel.description: Curated Malaysia, global, and tech headlines.

item.title: SNAPSHOT | 'It wasn't me', Rafizi denies skipping term limit vote; Julau MP blames traffic for absence
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
KINI SNAPSHOT | What's going on in the news today, with updates at 9am, 2pm, 6pm and 9pm.

item.title: Immigration must act on overstayers as Malaysia moves to fix tourist entry-exit imbalance, says minister
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — The Immigration Department must take enforcement action against tourists who do not leave...

item.title: Dream job turns into nightmare for Malaysian in Abu Dhabi
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
How explosions outside her hotel window early on Sunday morning left one local expatriate shaken and sleepless.

item.title: Partyless for now but Suhaili vows to defend Labuan seat in GE16
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
If not fielded by PKR or GRS, Suhaili Abdul Rahman says he will run as an independent candidate.

item.title: PKR branches in Sarawak told to prepare for potential state polls
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
SIBU, March 3 — All Parti Keadilan Rakyat (PKR) branches in Sarawak are urged to fortify their election machinery...

item.title: Suhaili mahu pertahan Labuan pada PRU16 walau kini tanpa parti
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Wakil rakyat tiga penggal itu tidak tolak bertanding atas tiket PKR, GRS atau bebas.

item.title: In Dewan Rakyat today: MACC’s recovered funds in focus as PM Anwar faces scrutiny over Madani record
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — The total amount of money and assets successfully recovered by the Malaysian Anti-Corrupti...

item.title: Ringgit edges higher as risk-off mood persists
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The local note climbs to 3.9210/3.9340 amid continuing uncertainty surrounding the Middle East conflict.

item.title: ‘Safety and wellbeing’ will guide F1 Mideast planning, says FIA chief
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Concerns are mounting over whether next month's Bahrain race from April 10-12 and Saudi Arabia a week later will be able to go ahead.

item.title: Suspected cable theft disrupts MRT Putrajaya Line near Damansara Damai, repairs to last all day
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — Rapid Rail Sdn Bhd today confirmed a service disruption on the MRT Putrajaya Line between...

item.title: Melania Trump chairs UN meeting on children days after Iran school strike
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US First Lady Melania Trump has presided over a UN Security Council meeting focusing on children in conflict.

item.title: Energy infrastructure emerges as war target, lifting prices
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
European natural gas prices finished the day up more than 39% after surging more than 50% earlier in the day.

item.title: SKMM kemuka 5,409 permohonan turun kandungan palsu sejak 2022
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
SKMM berkata 92% daripada kandungan sedemikian yang ditandai antara 2022 dan Januari 2026 sudah diturunkan.

item.title: UN chief calls for ‘way out’ of Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
‘What is needed now in the region more than anything, is a way out.’

item.title: YOURSAY | What's wrong with using public relations to preserve good image?
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
'Is this enough to be construed as trying to overthrow the govt?'

item.title: US state department urges Americans to ‘depart now’ from much of Middle East
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The US for now is asking Americans to leave commercially, although flights have been severely disrupted in much of the region.

item.title: Safeguarding Malaysia’s natural healers
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Excessive harvesting and habitat loss are threatening key medicinal flora such as tongkat ali and kacip fatimah.

item.title: Pertikaian Petronas-Sarawak: Mahkamah Persekutuan akan bertindak adil, kata Ahli Parlimen
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Ahli Parlimen Tebrau Jimmy Puah berkata hakim akan pertimbang aspek perundangan, daya maju komersial, pertumbuhan ekonomi dan semangat federalisme.

item.title: Apex court will act impartially in Petronas-S’wak dispute, says MP
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Tebrau MP Jimmy Puah says the judges will consider the law, commercial viability, economic growth and the spirit of federalism.

item.title: US has no immediate plan to tap oil reserve on Iran concerns
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
New policies boost US oil production to record highs, including additional supply from renewed Venezuela market access.

item.title: US’s Rubio tries to justify attacks on Iran as driven by self-defence
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Marco Rubio has tried to justify the coordinated attacks with Israel on Iran since Saturday as driven by self-defence.

item.title: Intelligence warns of Iranian attacks on US following Khamenei’s death
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The report suggests that while large-scale physical attacks are unlikely, Iranian proxies pose a threat of targeted attacks.

item.title: US urges citizens to immediately leave over a dozen Middle East countries
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The latest advisory includes Egypt, Israel, Saudi Arabia and Qatar, according to a State Department official.

item.title: ChatGPT uninstalls surged by 295% after DoD deal
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Many consumers ditched ChatGPT's app after news of its DoD deal went live, while Claude's downloads grew.

item.title: Hilton KL offers a meaningful feast for all this Ramadan
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Heritage flavours and sustainable touches shape this year’s iftar called ‘Jamuan Penuh Makna, Raikan Detik Bersama’.

item.title: Shields up, Dr Sam! You’re in the hot seat now
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
PAS vice-president Samsuri Mokhtar, as the new chairman of Perikatan Nasional, has to contend with threats from within the party and the opposition coalition.

item.title: Pijak al-Quran, politik emosi dan ujian sebenar hidup bersama
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Jika setiap insiden agama dijadikan medan mobilisasi emosi maka kita sedang menggadaikan prinsip yang kita dakwa mahu pertahankan.

item.title: Iran live news: Israel bombs Tehran, Beirut; Strait of Hormuz ‘closed’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Iran strikes energy infrastructure across the Gulf as IRGC announces closure of Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iranian missiles, interceptions seen over Israel
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Missiles were seen over Israel after the Israeli military said it had identified a new wave launched from Iran.

item.title: Witness describes Israeli-US ‘double-tap’ strike on downtown Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
A witness says the US and Israel bombed civilians in Tehran, as they rushed to help survivors from another bombing.

item.title: Bill Clinton, under oath, says had no knowledge of Epstein’s sex crimes
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The former US president tells a congressional panel that he saw nothing during interactions that suggested women were trafficked.

item.title: Lebanese state bans Hezbollah military activities
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The move came hours after Hezbollah announced it had launched rockets and drones towards Israel to avenge the killing of Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Pentagon says US not veering into a new, endless war
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Defence officials decline to give a timeline while cautioning of more US casualties after six have been killed so far.

item.title: Kuwait tertembak 3 jet pejuang AS
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Markas Pemerintahan Pusat AS mengesahkan semua enam anak kapalnya melenting keluar dengan selamat dan dalam keadaan stabil.

item.title: Milei’s flagship labour reform challenged in court
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The law allows working days of up to 12 hours, reduces severance pay, limits the right to strike and lowers employer taxes, among other provisions.

item.title: Kajang temple questions S'gor govt's RM3m road plan, says 50m pathway enough
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
Temple leader blames current MB, says no issues under predecessors.

item.title: Adun Bukit Tambun disebut-sebut sebagai pengganti Fahmi
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Sumber parti kata Goh Choon Aik disebut-sebut sebagai pengganti Fahmi Zainol.

item.title: AI-generated Raya cards more popular than ever
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Many are having a go at creating handwritten notes to animated avatars with heart.

item.title: PKR’s Bukit Tambun rep tipped to fill suspended Fahmi’s exco slot
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Party source says Goh Choon Aik’s name has emerged as a likely replacement for Fahmi Zainol, as Penang chief minister weighs next steps.

item.title: Gaza fuel running short after Israel closes borders amid Iran war
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The closures follow Israeli joint air strikes with the US as fighting spreads, with crossings deemed unsafe during war.

item.title: Keadaan di Qatar belum stabil, kata kedutaan
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Kedutaan Besar Malaysia di Doha sedang mengumpul data untuk mengemas kini rekod rakyat Malaysia yang terkandas.

item.title: Stripe wants to turn your AI costs into a profit center
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Stripe released a preview intended to allow AI companies to easily track, pass through, and make a profit on underlying AI model fees.

item.title: Over 5,400 fake image takedown requests from MCMC since 2022
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
MCMC says 92% of such content flagged between 2022 and January 2026 was removed.

item.title: Global brands shut Middle East stores as conflict causes chaos
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Investors fear the conflict could undermine the region's tourism and luxury spending, a key growth driver for major brands.

item.title: Iran says will attack any ship trying to pass through Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Ebrahim Jabari, a senior adviser to the IRGC's commander-in-chief, reiterates that the Strait of Hormuz is 'closed'.

item.title: New wave of heavy Israeli strikes hit Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
A new wave of heavy Israeli air strikes have hit multiple parts of Tehran.

item.title: Geopolitical drama reportedly stalls IPO of SoftBank-backed PayPay
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The Japan-based company reportedly aimed for a public valuation of at least ¥1.5 trillion ($10 billion).

item.title: Rubio says Israel’s strike plan triggered US attack on Iran
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The secretary of state said the US struck Iran to stop Tehran from retaliating against American troops following anticipated Israeli actions.

item.title: Penangites step up to protect endangered primates
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Founded by Jo Leen Yap, Langur Project Penang is aimed at safeguarding the dusky langur while nurturing compassion and cohabitation.

item.title: AG-PP split explained: Key things to know about Malaysia’s massive legal reform
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — The Malaysian government is proposing one of the country’s biggest legal reforms in...

item.title: No one has a good plan for how AI companies should work with the government
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
As OpenAI transitions from a wildly successful consumer startup into a piece of national security infrastructure, the company seems unequipped to manage its new responsibilities.

item.title: A new app alerts you if someone nearby is wearing smart glasses
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
A hobbyist developer's new app, which can detect nearby smart glasses, comes amid resistance to always-on recording and listening devices that invade people's privacy.

item.title: Anthropic upgrades Claude’s memory to attract AI switchers
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Anthropic is making it easier to switch to its Claude AI from other chatbots with an update that brings Claude's memory feature to users on the free plan, along with a new prompt and dedicated tool for importing data from other chatbots. These upgrades could allow users who have been using rivals like OpenAI's ChatGPT […]

item.title: Instagram tracked growing usage while targeting teens, lawyers argue
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The company said usage grew from 40 minutes per day in 2023 to 46 minutes in 2026. Other documents referenced teens as being a top priority for the app before asking existing users for birthdays.

item.title: Apple’s cheapest AirPods have hit $89
item.description:
Source: The Verge
It’s a good day for Apple fans on a budget. Not only did the company introduce a new budget phone, its entry-level AirPods 4 are also on sale. Right now, you can snag a pair of Apple’s AirPods 4 starting at just $89 ($30 off) at Walmart. The model with active noise-cancellation are also down […]

item.title: What dangers does the Iran war pose for Israel?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Both the collapse and survival of Iran's Islamic Republic pose risks.

item.title: Rubio suggests US strikes on Iran were influenced by Israeli plans
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Secretary of state says he hopes Iranian people will overthrow regime, as US military says six service members killed.

item.title: How the new iPhone 17E stacks up against Apple’s pricier phones
item.description:
Source: The Verge
The iPhone 17 lineup now has a “budget” option. Announced this week, the iPhone 17E will hit stores on Wednesday, March 11th, starting at $599, with preorders opening on March 4th. The 6.1-inch phone joins the rest of Apple’s iPhone 17 lineup, which includes the iPhone 17 ($799), the more powerful iPhone 17 Pro ($1,099), […]

item.title: Spain refuses to let US use bases for Iran attacks
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez has condemned US and Israeli strikes on Iran.

item.title: US-Israeli strikes hit housing, hospitals, and more in Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The damage from US-Israeli strikes on Tehran is growing, with hits on housing, hospitals, police stations, and more.

item.title: Apple might use Google servers to store data for its upgraded AI Siri
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Apple has asked Google to look into "setting up servers" for a new version of Siri that's Gemini-powered and meets Apple's privacy requirements, The Information reports. Apple had already announced in January that Google's Gemini AI models would help power the upgraded version of Siri it delayed last year, but The Information's report indicates Apple […]

item.title: Mastodon now has a button for sharing content from other websites
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Sharing content to Mastodon is getting easier with the addition of a universal "Share to Mastodon" button for the decentralized social media platform. Announced on Monday, the widget allows users to share content on any Mastodon server by connecting your Mastodon account and redirecting you to the server that account is on. The blog post […]

item.title: Anti-war candidates pose early test for US Democrats after attacks on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Nida Alla, Kat Abughazaleh among those seeking new aims for Dems in midterms, including abolishing ICE and ending wars.

item.title: Netanyahu: Iran would ‘threaten all of humanity’ with nuclear weapon
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu visited the Beit Shemesh site where an Iranian missile strike killed 9 people.

item.title: US and Israeli interests may soon diverge on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Trump and Netanyahu are in this war for very different reasons. And that will soon show.

item.title: Trump says Iran war projected to last 4 to 5 weeks, could go ‘far longer’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
In latest statement, Trump says US was 'very nearly under threat' from Iran, drawing immediacy of attacks into question.

item.title: You could be an influencer without even realizing it
item.description:
Source: The Verge
In late February, Puck reported on a strange case: An influencer with more than a million followers was inadvertently promoting products on Instagram. On some of Julia Berolzheimer's posts, a "Shop the look" button hovered in the corner. When followers clicked it, they were fed similar items to what Berolzheimer was wearing. Her job is […]

item.title: Users are ditching ChatGPT for Claude — here’s how to make the switch
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Following controversies surrounding ChatGPT, many users are ditching the AI chatbot for Claude instead. Here's how to make the switch.

item.title: Why QatarEnergy’s LNG production halt could shake up global gas markets
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Qatar supplies 20 percent of the world's LNG. If that's off the table, countries must scramble for the remaining gas.

item.title: Paramount+ and HBO Max to merge into one streaming service after WBD deal closes
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Ellison reassured investors that HBO’s identity and creative vision as a studio would remain unchanged, stating, “Our viewpoint is HBO should stay HBO.”

item.title: Trump: this was the best chance to strike Iran’s ‘sick and sinister regime’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US President Donald Trump outlined the objectives of the US-Israeli attack on Iran.

item.title: Donut Lab’s solid-state battery can handle the (extreme) heat, test says
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Finnish startup Donut Lab is out to prove that its solid-state battery is all that it claims to be. Last week, the test was about fast charging. This week is where things get hot. Like the first test, this one was also conducted by state-owned VTT Technical Research Centre of Finland. The team set out […]

item.title: France to increase nuclear warheads, lend nuclear aircraft to Europe allies
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Macron's 'advanced deterrence' will be a nuclear-security relationship with key allies distinct from NATO arrangements.

item.title: AI-generated art can’t be copyrighted after Supreme Court declines to review the rule
item.description:
Source: The Verge
The US Supreme Court has declined to hear a case over whether AI-generated art can obtain a copyright, as reported earlier by Reuters. The Monday decision comes after Stephen Thaler, a computer scientist from Missouri, appealed a court's decision to uphold a ruling that found AI-generated art can't be copyrighted. In 2019, the US Copyright […]

item.title: ‘This war might push Iran to a bomb faster.’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Former US diplomat Henry Ensher warns future Iranian leadership may see a nuclear deterrent as a defensive necessity.

item.title: Here’s the upgrade to my favorite phone camera of last year
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Vivo rarely has a presence at MWC, but this year it bucked that trend in a big way, with the reveal of its next flagship phone, the X300 Ultra, alongside an upgraded telephoto extender lens and professional camera cage. The company isn't ready to launch the handset just yet - or even reveal very many […]

item.title: How the US hit Iran with a banned AI
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Al Jazeera’s Linh Nguyen explains the dispute between the Pentagon and Anthropic over how AI should be used in warfare.

item.title: Tech workers urge DOD, Congress to withdraw Anthropic label as a supply-chain risk
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Tech workers have signed an open letter urging the Department of Defense to withdraw its designation of Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" and instead to settle the matter quietly.

item.title: Protests across India against Khamenei’s killing
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Protests erupt across India after Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is killed in US-Israeli air strikes on Iran.

item.title: Nvidia’s spending $4 billion on photonics to stay ahead of the curve in AI
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Nvidia announced on Monday that it's investing $2 billion each into Lumentum and Coherent, which are both developing photonics technology for data centers, like optical transceivers, circuit switches, and lasers, which are used to move data at high speeds over long distances. Their tech could improve energy efficiency, data transfer speeds, and bandwidth in future […]

item.title: Starmer lets US use bases for Iran clash: UK’s military, legal quagmire
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
A drone strike at a British base in Cyprus has highlighted the UK’s precarious in US attacks on Iran.

item.title: ‘Speed, surprise, and violence of action’: how US launched attack on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, US General Dan Caine detailed how American forces launched attacks on Iran.

item.title: X adds ‘Paid Partnership’ labels so creators can ditch the hashtags
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The new labels comply with regulations and allow creators to be more transparent with their followers.

item.title: Hacktivists claim to have hacked Homeland Security to release ICE contract data
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
A hacking group called Department of Peace said they hacked a specific office within Homeland Security to protest ICE’s mass deportation campaign, and the companies aiding it.

item.title: A married founder duo’s company, 14.ai, is replacing customer support teams at startups
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
14.ai also launched a consumer brand to understand how much AI can handle customer support tasks.

item.title: Apple speeds up the iPad Air with an M4 upgrade, starting at $599
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Apple refreshes the iPad Air with the M4 chip and more memory to make it better for AI use cases.

item.title: Apple bakes in AI smarts into its new $599 iPhone 17e
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The base model comes with 256 GB of storage, which Apple says is twice the entry storage from the previous generation at the same starting price.

item.title: Hackers and internet outages hit Iran amid US air strikes
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Users of a popular Iranian prayer app were flooded with phone notifications as U.S. air strikes hit Iran's biggest cities, killing the country's leader.

item.title: MyFitnessPal has acquired Cal AI, the viral calorie app built by teens
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
After wooing Cal AI for months, MyFitnessPal has successfully acquired its up-and-coming rival, Cal AI, the app built by teens soaring on the apps stores.

item.title: Parade’s Cami Tellez announces new creator economy marketing platform, $4M in funding
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Cami Tellez announces launch of new company, $4 million raise.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude reports widespread outage
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Anthropic's AI chatbot Claude experienced widespread service disruptions on Monday morning, with thousands of users reporting issues accessing the bot.

item.title: Anthony Loke denounces absent lawmakers after PM term limit Bill fails by just two votes
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — DAP secretary-general Anthony Loke has called on civil society and voters to punish lawmak...

item.title: Preacher Firdaus Wong claims man in Quran desecration case is a Muslim convert who approached him
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
PETALING JAYA, March 2 – A controversial case of religious desecration has taken a surprising new turn, with promi...

item.title: Ten suspects held in Bukit Kayu Hitam AKPS commander shooting case
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
ALOR SETAR, March 2 — Police have so far arrested 10 suspects to assist in the shooting incident targeting a vehic...

item.title: Two votes short: Move to limit PM tenure fails in Parliament amid high absenteeism
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — In a major blow to proposed democratic reforms, the Dewan Rakyat today failed to pass a co...

item.title: PM term limit bill falters, short of just 2 votes
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
UPDATED 7.05PM | PARLIAMENT | 146 voted for the bill, 32 absent, 44 abstained.

item.title: Kuantan man to be charged over desecration of Quran in viral video
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
PUTRAJAYA, March 2 — A man will be charged tomorrow for allegedly desecrating a copy of the Quran in Kuantan, Paha...

item.title: Student with autism seriously hurt after 4th-floor fall at Kedah school
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
SUNGAI PETANI, March 2 — A student with disabilities at a secondary school near here was seriously injured after h...

item.title: Ex-SRC director tells court he had no knowledge of RM42m transactions during his tenure
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — A former director of SRC International Sdn Bhd categorically denied that any act or omissi...

item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — The Ministry of Housing and Local Government (KPKT), through the Town and Country Planning...

item.title: Selangor police probe RM200,000 crypto theft case, 12 officers under investigation
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
SHAH ALAM, March 2 — Police are still awaiting a digital forensics report on a theft case involving 12 police pers...

item.title: Malaysia Airlines confirms London and Paris flights operating as scheduled
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — Malaysia Airlines has confirmed that all its flights to and from London and Paris are oper...

item.title: Inland Revenue Board says MyTax portal facing disruption, apologises and pledges swift restoration
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
PUTRAJAYA, March 2 — The MyTax portal is currently experiencing a technical disruption, making it temporarily inac...

item.title: DAP MP demands clear answer from ministry on Jho Low's Interpol red notice
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
PARLIAMENT | 'Bringing him back needed for closure, to restore public confidence.'

item.title: Police arrest nine suspects in gang‑related cable thefts, solving cases in Selangor, KL and Kedah
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
SHAH ALAM, March 2 — Police have arrested nine individuals believed to be involved in a gang-related cable theft c...

item.title: Penang MACC questions 63 over alleged zakat fund misuse and land deals
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — A total of 63 individuals have been summoned by the Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission (...

item.title: SMC Ranked Malaysia’s No. 1 Hospital In Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Sunway Medical Centre is home to more than 300 resident medical consultants and provides comprehensive care across over 80 medical specialties and 28 Centres of Excellence. The post SMC Ranked Malaysia’s No. 1 Hospital In Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 appeared first on CodeBlue .

item.title: LRT3 in final testing phase, official launch date pending safety nod, says Prasarana chief
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — The latest developments regarding the Light Rail Transit 3 (LRT3) service linking Shah Ala...

item.title: ‘Not an act of betrayal’: Minister says Lynas’s 10-year licence renewal bars new radioactive waste facility
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — The government’s green light for Lynas Malaysia’s 10-year operating licence re...

item.title: Anwar reassures Parliament: PM term limit won’t diminish Agong’s role or Dewan Rakyat’s confidence powers
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — The constitutional amendment to limit the Prime Minister’s tenure to 10 years will n...

item.title: School guard pleads guilty to 13 charges of sexually assaulting six-year-old daughter in Johor Bahru
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
JOHOR BAHRU, March 2 — A school security guard was charged in the Sessions Court here today with 13 offences, incl...

item.title: Home Ministry unveils tough guardrails as MACC nets 36 civil servants, RM22m in bribes exposed
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission (MACC) has recorded 36 arrests involving civil se...

item.title: Space Nursing: A New Frontier In Health Care — Mohd Irwan Hakeem Mohd Arif
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Nursing is more than bedside care; it is scientific, research-driven, and adaptive. Space nursing demonstrates how far nurses can extend their expertise, reaching environments once thought unreachable. The post Space Nursing: A New Frontier In Health Care — Mohd Irwan Hakeem Mohd Arif appeared first on CodeBlue .

item.title: Finance minister highlights ringgit’s 4.31pc rise, citing reforms, strong growth and stable politics
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — The value of the ringgit had increased by 4.31 per cent to RM3.89 against the US dollar as...

item.title: Syed Saddiq won't contest to reclaim Muda presidency
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
Muar MP cites his ongoing corruption case, says leaders need to be 'whiter than white.'

item.title: Foreign Ministry assures safety of Malaysian pilgrims, students amid Saudi flight disruptions and regional tensions
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)

item.title: Teo Nie Ching: 90pc of takedown requests executed as Online Safety Act takes effect
